message:
feat(http): append Antigravity version to User-Agent when
PI_AI_ANTIGRAVITY_VERSION environment variable is set

- Add ANTIGRAVITY_VERSION_ENV constant for the env var name
- In Client::new(), check PI_AI_ANTIGRAVITY_VERSION and format
  User-Agent as 'pi_agent_rust/VERSION Antigravity/X.Y.Z' when set,
  falling back to plain 'pi_agent_rust/VERSION' otherwise
- Enables server-side analytics to distinguish Antigravity-wrapped
  requests from direct pi_agent_rust usage

Tests:
- antigravity_user_agent_format: verify UA string format with version
- antigravity_user_agent_in_request_headers: verify UA appears in
  built HTTP request bytes

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
